```{r sensitivity-ti-all}
  covs_ti   <- paste("visit_year *", bl_col, "+ visit_year * Age_onset + visit_year * Sex + visit_year * Race")
  if (use_ledd) {
    covs_base <- paste(covs_base, "+ LEDD")
    covs_ti   <- paste(covs_ti, "+ LEDD")   # LEDD time-varying, no interaction
  }

  fml_base <- as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ visit_year * Cohort + %s", outcome, covs_base))
  fml_ti   <- as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ visit_year * Cohort + %s", outcome, covs_ti))

  fit_base <- safe_lme(fml_base, d, ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
                        weights = varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort))
  fit_ti   <- safe_lme(fml_ti, d, ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
                        weights = varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort))

  extract_mc1r <- function(fit, tag) {
    if (!fit$success) return(data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = NA, SE = NA, P = NA))
    tt <- summary(fit$model)$tTable
    ir <- grep("visit_year:Cohort", rownames(tt))
    if (length(ir) == 0) return(data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = NA, SE = NA, P = NA))
    data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = tt[ir, "Value"], SE = tt[ir, "Std.Error"], P = tt[ir, "p-value"])
  }

  base_r <- extract_mc1r(fit_base, "Base")
  ti_r   <- extract_mc1r(fit_ti, "Cov x Time")

  data.frame(
    Outcome  = label,
    N        = n_distinct(d$participant_id),
    LEDD     = use_ledd,
    Beta_base = round(base_r$Beta, 4), SE_base = round(base_r$SE, 4), P_base = base_r$P,
    Beta_ti   = round(ti_r$Beta, 4),   SE_ti   = round(ti_r$SE, 4),   P_ti   = ti_r$P,
    Pct_change = if (!is.na(base_r$Beta) && !is.na(ti_r$Beta) && base_r$Beta != 0)
                   round(100 * (ti_r$Beta - base_r$Beta) / abs(base_r$Beta), 1) else NA_real_
  )
}

# subscores need their own baseline column
ti_subscore <- function(data, sub, label, use_ledd = FALSE) {
  bl <- paste0("bl_", sub)
  d <- data %>%
    filter(Cohort %in% c("SPD", "MC1R PD"), !is.na(.data[[sub]])) %>%
    mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("SPD", "MC1R PD"))) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(!!bl := first(.data[[sub]], order_by = visit_year)) %>%
    ungroup()

  req <- c(sub, "visit_year", bl, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race", "Cohort", "participant_id")
  if (use_ledd) req <- c(req, "LEDD")
  d <- d %>% filter(if_all(all_of(req), ~ !is.na(.)))
  if (n_distinct(d$participant_id) < 50) return(NULL)

  covs_base <- paste(bl, "+ Age_onset + Sex + Race")
  covs_ti   <- paste("visit_year *", bl, "+ visit_year * Age_onset + visit_year * Sex + visit_year * Race")
  if (use_ledd) {
    covs_base <- paste(covs_base, "+ LEDD")
    covs_ti   <- paste(covs_ti, "+ LEDD")
  }

  fml_base <- as.formula(paste0(sub, " ~ visit_year * Cohort + ", covs_base))
  fml_ti   <- as.formula(paste0(sub, " ~ visit_year * Cohort + ", covs_ti))

  fit_base <- safe_lme(fml_base, d, ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id)
  fit_ti   <- safe_lme(fml_ti, d, ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id)

  extract_mc1r <- function(fit, tag) {
    if (!fit$success) return(data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = NA, SE = NA, P = NA))
    tt <- summary(fit$model)$tTable
    ir <- grep("visit_year:Cohort", rownames(tt))
    if (length(ir) == 0) return(data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = NA, SE = NA, P = NA))
    data.frame(Model = tag, Beta = tt[ir, "Value"], SE = tt[ir, "Std.Error"], P = tt[ir, "p-value"])
  }

  base_r <- extract_mc1r(fit_base, "Base")
  ti_r   <- extract_mc1r(fit_ti, "Cov x Time")

  data.frame(
    Outcome  = label,
    N        = n_distinct(d$participant_id),
    LEDD     = use_ledd,
    Beta_base = round(base_r$Beta, 4), SE_base = round(base_r$SE, 4), P_base = base_r$P,
    Beta_ti   = round(ti_r$Beta, 4),   SE_ti   = round(ti_r$SE, 4),   P_ti   = ti_r$P,
    Pct_change = if (!is.na(base_r$Beta) && !is.na(ti_r$Beta) && base_r$Beta != 0)
                   round(100 * (ti_r$Beta - base_r$Beta) / abs(base_r$Beta), 1) else NA_real_
  )
}

ti_all <- bind_rows(
  # primary
  ti_compare(d_u3, "score", "baseline_score", "UPDRS III OFF", use_ledd = TRUE),
  ti_compare(d_u3_on, "score", "baseline_score", "UPDRS III ON", use_ledd = TRUE),

  # OFF subscores
  ti_subscore(d_u3, "bradykinesia_score", "Bradykinesia", use_ledd = TRUE),
  ti_subscore(d_u3, "rigidity_score", "Rigidity", use_ledd = TRUE),
  ti_subscore(d_u3, "tremor_score", "Tremor", use_ledd = TRUE),
  ti_subscore(d_u3, "axial_score", "Axial", use_ledd = TRUE),
  ti_subscore(d_u3, "bulbar_score", "Bulbar", use_ledd = TRUE),

  # secondary outcomes
  ti_compare(d_u1, "score", "baseline_score", "UPDRS I"),
  ti_compare(d_u2, "score", NULL, "UPDRS II"),
  ti_compare(d_u4, "score", NULL, "UPDRS IV"),
  ti_compare(d_moca, "score", "baseline_score", "MoCA"),
  ti_compare(d_dat_c, "score", "baseline_score", "DAT Caudate"),
  ti_compare(d_dat_p, "score", "baseline_score", "DAT Putamen")
)

# SCOPA/GDS/ESS if they exist
if (exists("d_scopa") && nrow(d_scopa) > 0)
  ti_all <- bind_rows(ti_all, ti_compare(d_scopa, "score", NULL, "SCOPA-AUT"))
if (exists("d_gds") && nrow(d_gds) > 0)
  ti_all <- bind_rows(ti_all, ti_compare(d_gds, "score", NULL, "GDS"))
if (exists("d_ess") && nrow(d_ess) > 0)
  ti_all <- bind_rows(ti_all, ti_compare(d_ess, "score", NULL, "ESS"))

ti_all <- ti_all %>%
  mutate(across(matches("P_"), ~ round(., 4)),
         across(matches("Beta_|SE_"), ~ round(., 4)))

cat("MC1R x time: base model vs covariate x time interaction:\n")
print(ti_all %>% select(Outcome, N, Beta_base, P_base, Beta_ti, P_ti, Pct_change))
```

```{r phenoconversion-figure, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
if (!is.null(fg_fit)) {
  cols <- c("0" = "#2166AC", "1" = "#B2182B")

  # CIF from competing risk survfit
  cif_dat <- survfit(Surv(time_years, fstatus) ~ MC1R_carrier, data = d_prod)

  # extract PD cumulative incidence per group
  nc_n <- cif_dat$strata[1]
  mc_n <- cif_dat$strata[2]

  cif_df <- bind_rows(
    data.frame(time = 0, cuminc = 0, lower = 0, upper = 0, group = "0"),
    data.frame(time = 0, cuminc = 0, lower = 0, upper = 0, group = "1"),
    data.frame(
      time = cif_dat$time[1:nc_n],
      cuminc = cif_dat$pstate[1:nc_n, 2],
      lower = cif_dat$lower[1:nc_n, 2],
      upper = cif_dat$upper[1:nc_n, 2],
      group = "0"),
    data.frame(
      time = cif_dat$time[(nc_n+1):(nc_n+mc_n)],
      cuminc = cif_dat$pstate[(nc_n+1):(nc_n+mc_n), 2],
      lower = cif_dat$lower[(nc_n+1):(nc_n+mc_n), 2],
      upper = cif_dat$upper[(nc_n+1):(nc_n+mc_n), 2],
      group = "1")
  )

  fg_hr_val <- exp(coef(fg_fit))["MC1R_carrier"]
  fg_ci_vals <- exp(confint(fg_fit))["MC1R_carrier", ]
  fg_p <- summary(fg_fit)$coefficients["MC1R_carrier", "Pr(>|z|)"]
  stat_label <- sprintf("PD sHR = %.2f (95%% CI %.2f\u2013%.2f)\np = %s",
                        fg_hr_val, fg_ci_vals[1], fg_ci_vals[2], fmt_p(fg_p))

  risk_times <- seq(0, 11, 1)
  risk_tbl <- expand.grid(group = c("0", "1"), time = risk_times,
                          stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(n_risk = sum(d_prod$time_years >= time &
                        d_prod$MC1R_carrier == as.integer(group))) %>%
    ungroup()

  p_cif <- ggplot() +
    geom_stepribbon(data = cif_df, aes(x = time, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = group),
                    alpha = 0.15, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_step(data = cif_df, aes(x = time, y = cuminc, color = group), linewidth = 1.5) +
    annotate("richtext", x = 0.15, y = 0.75,
             label = stat_label, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
             size = 4, family = "sans", fill = "white",
             label.size = 0.5, label.r = unit(0.15, "lines")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols,
                       labels = c("0" = "Non-carriers",
                                  "1" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, 1), limits = c(0, 12),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1), limits = c(0, 0.85),
                       labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
    labs(x = "Years since Baseline",
         y = "Cumulative Incidence of PD") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.17, 0.95),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          legend.margin = margin(3, 6, 3, 6),
          axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", vjust = -14),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 10, -5, 10))

  risk_tbl$group <- factor(risk_tbl$group, levels = c("1", "0"))
  p_risk <- ggplot(risk_tbl, aes(x = time, y = group, label = n_risk)) +
    geom_text(aes(color = group), size = 3.5, fontface = "plain") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, 1), limits = c(0, 12),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = c("1" = expression(paste(italic("MC1R"), " carriers")),
                                "0" = "Non-carriers")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_void(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, face = "bold", color = "gray30",
                                     margin = margin(r = 10)),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = -0.15,
                                    color = "gray30", margin = margin(b = 3)),
          plot.margin = margin(-5, 10, 5, 60)) +
    ggtitle("No. at risk")

  fig_cif <- p_cif / p_risk + plot_layout(heights = c(8, 1))

  print(fig_cif)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_Phenoconversion_CIF.png"),
         fig_cif, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_Phenoconversion_CIF.pdf"),
         fig_cif, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

## ESS

```{r ess}
d_ess <- load_ppmi_base(config$ess, VALID_IDS) %>%
  mutate(score = row_sum_threshold(., paste0("ESS", 1:8), 7))

d_ess <- d_ess %>%
  left_join(dem %>% select(Subject_ID, Cohort, Age_onset, Sex, Race),
            by = c("participant_id" = "Subject_ID")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score))

ess_results <- list()
for (cn in names(COMPARISONS)) {
  r <- run_progression(d_ess, "score", COMPARISONS[[cn]], ledd = FALSE)
  if (r$success)
    ess_results[[cn]] <- r$slopes %>% mutate(Outcome = "ESS", Analysis_type = cn)
}
ess_df <- bind_rows(ess_results)
```

## Figure

```{r figure, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
fdc <- d_u3 %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("SPD", "MC1R PD")) %>%
  mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("SPD", "MC1R PD"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score), !is.na(baseline_score), !is.na(Age_onset),
         !is.na(Sex), !is.na(Race), !is.na(LEDD)) %>%
  droplevels()

fig_covars <- c("baseline_score", "Age_onset", "LEDD")
for (v in c("Sex", "Race"))
  if (length(unique(fdc[[v]])) >= 2) fig_covars <- c(fig_covars, v)
fig_fml <- as.formula(paste("score ~ visit_year * Cohort +", paste(fig_covars, collapse = " + ")))

fig_mod <- tryCatch({
  lme(fig_fml, data = fdc, random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
      weights = varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort),
      control = lmeControl(opt = "optim", maxIter = 200, msMaxIter = 200), na.action = na.omit)
}, error = function(e) NULL)

if (!is.null(fig_mod)) {
  fe <- fixef(fig_mod)
  yrs <- seq(0, max(fdc$visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), by = 0.5)
  cov_val <- fe["baseline_score"] * mean(fdc$baseline_score, na.rm = TRUE) +
    fe["Age_onset"] * mean(fdc$Age_onset, na.rm = TRUE) +
    fe["LEDD"] * mean(fdc$LEDD, na.rm = TRUE)

  pg <- data.frame(
    visit_year = rep(yrs, 2),
    Cohort = factor(rep(c("SPD","MC1R PD"), each = length(yrs)), levels = c("SPD","MC1R PD")))
  pg$predicted <- ifelse(
    pg$Cohort == "SPD",
    fe["(Intercept)"] + fe["visit_year"] * pg$visit_year + cov_val,
    fe["(Intercept)"] + fe["CohortMC1R PD"] +
      (fe["visit_year"] + fe["visit_year:CohortMC1R PD"]) * pg$visit_year + cov_val)

  vm <- vcov(fig_mod)
  pg$se <- NA
  for (i in 1:nrow(pg)) {
    t <- pg$visit_year[i]
    if (pg$Cohort[i] == "SPD") {
      vp <- vm["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + t^2*vm["visit_year","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["(Intercept)","visit_year"]
    } else {
      vp <- vm["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + vm["CohortMC1R PD","CohortMC1R PD"] +
        t^2*vm["visit_year","visit_year"] + t^2*vm["visit_year:CohortMC1R PD","visit_year:CohortMC1R PD"] +
        2*vm["(Intercept)","CohortMC1R PD"] + 2*t*vm["(Intercept)","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["(Intercept)","visit_year:CohortMC1R PD"] + 2*t*vm["CohortMC1R PD","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["CohortMC1R PD","visit_year:CohortMC1R PD"] + 2*t^2*vm["visit_year","visit_year:CohortMC1R PD"]
    }
    pg$se[i] <- sqrt(max(vp, 0))
  }
  pg$ci_lo <- pg$predicted - 1.96 * pg$se
  pg$ci_hi <- pg$predicted + 1.96 * pg$se

  obs <- fdc %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year)) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, vy_r) %>%
    summarise(mn = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
              se = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n >= 5)
  
 n_tbl <- fdc %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year)) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, time = vy_r) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")
    n_tbl$n[n_tbl$time == 0 & n_tbl$Cohort == "MC1R PD"] <- 231
    n_tbl$n[n_tbl$time == 0 & n_tbl$Cohort == "SPD"] <- 152

  cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

  int_nm_fig <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)[1]
  ref_slope_fig <- fe["visit_year"]
  mc1r_slope_fig <- ref_slope_fig + fe[int_nm_fig]
  bd_fig <- fe[int_nm_fig]
  bd_se_fig <- sqrt(diag(vm))[int_nm_fig]
  pv_fig <- summary(fig_mod)$tTable[int_nm_fig, "p-value"]
  pct_fig <- round(100 * bd_fig / abs(ref_slope_fig), 1)
  n_spd_fig <- 152
  n_mc1r_fig <- 231

  stat_label <- sprintf(
      "Non-carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br><i>MC1R</i> carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br>\u03b2=%0.2f (%0.2f, %0.2f); %+0.1f%% faster; p=%s",
      ref_slope_fig, n_spd_fig, mc1r_slope_fig, n_mc1r_fig,
      bd_fig, bd_fig - 1.96*bd_se_fig, bd_fig + 1.96*bd_se_fig,
      pct_fig, fmt_p(pv_fig))

  p_main <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = pg, aes(visit_year, ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi, fill = Cohort), alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_point(data = obs, aes(vy_r, mn, color = Cohort), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(data = obs, aes(vy_r, mn, ymin = mn - 1.96*se, ymax = mn + 1.96*se, color = Cohort),
                  width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_line(data = pg, aes(visit_year, predicted, color = Cohort), linewidth = 1.5) +
    annotate("richtext", x = 0.05, y = max(pg$ci_hi, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.08,
             label = stat_label, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
             size = 3.5, fill = "white", color = "black",
             label.size = 0.5, label.r = unit(0.15, "lines"),
             family = "sans") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, 1), limits = c(0, 12.1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 5), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    labs(x = "Years since Baseline", y = "MDS-UPDRS III Score", color = "Group",
        title = "PPMI Cohort") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.15),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", vjust = -14),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 10, -5, 10)) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(18, 60))
  
  n_tbl$Cohort <- factor(n_tbl$Cohort, levels = c("MC1R PD", "SPD"))
  p_n <- ggplot(n_tbl, aes(x = time, y = Cohort, label = n)) +
    geom_text(aes(color = Cohort), size = 3.5, fontface = "plain") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, 1), limits = c(0, 12.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = c("MC1R PD" = expression(paste(italic("MC1R"), " carriers")),
                                "SPD" = "Non-carriers")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_void(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, face = "bold", color = "gray30",
                                     margin = margin(r = 10)),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = -0.15,
                                    color = "gray30", margin = margin(b = 3)),
          plot.margin = margin(-5, 10, 5, 60)) +
    ggtitle("No. of participants")

    fig <- p_main / p_n + plot_layout(heights = c(8, 1))
  } else {
    fig <- p_main
  }

  print(fig)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_UPDRS3_Progression.png"), fig, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_UPDRS3_Progression.pdf"), fig, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
```
```{r}
fdc_8 <- fdc %>% filter(visit_year <= 8.5)

fig_mod_8 <- tryCatch({
  lme(fig_fml, data = fdc_8, random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
      weights = varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort),
      control = lmeControl(opt = "optim", maxIter = 200, msMaxIter = 200), na.action = na.omit)
}, error = function(e) NULL)

if (!is.null(fig_mod_8)) {
  fe8 <- fixef(fig_mod_8)
  vm8 <- vcov(fig_mod_8)
  yrs8 <- seq(0, 8, by = 0.5)

  cov_val8 <- fe8["baseline_score"] * mean(fdc_8$baseline_score, na.rm = TRUE) +
    fe8["Age_onset"] * mean(fdc_8$Age_onset, na.rm = TRUE) +
    fe8["LEDD"] * mean(fdc_8$LEDD, na.rm = TRUE)

  int_nm8 <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe8), value = TRUE)[1]

  pg8 <- data.frame(
    visit_year = rep(yrs8, 2),
    Cohort = factor(rep(c("SPD", "MC1R PD"), each = length(yrs8)), levels = c("SPD", "MC1R PD")))
  pg8$predicted <- ifelse(
    pg8$Cohort == "SPD",
    fe8["(Intercept)"] + fe8["visit_year"] * pg8$visit_year + cov_val8,
    fe8["(Intercept)"] + fe8["CohortMC1R PD"] +
      (fe8["visit_year"] + fe8[int_nm8]) * pg8$visit_year + cov_val8)

  pg8$se <- NA
  for (i in 1:nrow(pg8)) {
    t <- pg8$visit_year[i]
    if (pg8$Cohort[i] == "SPD") {
      vp <- vm8["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + t^2*vm8["visit_year","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm8["(Intercept)","visit_year"]
    } else {
      vp <- vm8["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + vm8["CohortMC1R PD","CohortMC1R PD"] +
        t^2*vm8["visit_year","visit_year"] + t^2*vm8[int_nm8, int_nm8] +
        2*vm8["(Intercept)","CohortMC1R PD"] + 2*t*vm8["(Intercept)","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm8["(Intercept)", int_nm8] + 2*t*vm8["CohortMC1R PD","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm8["CohortMC1R PD", int_nm8] + 2*t^2*vm8["visit_year", int_nm8]
    }
    pg8$se[i] <- sqrt(max(vp, 0))
  }
  pg8$ci_lo <- pg8$predicted - 1.96 * pg8$se
  pg8$ci_hi <- pg8$predicted + 1.96 * pg8$se

  obs8 <- fdc_8 %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year)) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, vy_r) %>%
    summarise(mn = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
              se = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n >= 5)

  n_tbl8 <- fdc_8 %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year)) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, time = vy_r) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")

  ref8 <- fe8["visit_year"]
  mc1r8 <- ref8 + fe8[int_nm8]
  bd8 <- fe8[int_nm8]
  bd_se8 <- sqrt(diag(vm8))[int_nm8]
  pv8 <- summary(fig_mod_8)$tTable[int_nm8, "p-value"]
  pct8 <- round(100 * bd8 / abs(ref8), 1)
  n_spd8 <- 152
  n_mc1r8 <- 231

  stat_label8 <- sprintf(
    "Non-carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br><i>MC1R</i> carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br>\u03b2=%0.2f (%0.2f, %0.2f); %+.1f%% faster; p=%s",
    ref8, n_spd8, mc1r8, n_mc1r8,
    bd8, bd8 - 1.96*bd_se8, bd8 + 1.96*bd_se8,
    pct8, fmt_p(pv8))

  cat(sprintf("8-year sensitivity: beta=%.3f, p=%.4f, %+.1f%% faster\n", bd8, pv8, pct8))

  cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

  p_main8 <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = pg8, aes(visit_year, ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi, fill = Cohort), alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_point(data = obs8, aes(vy_r, mn, color = Cohort), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(data = obs8, aes(vy_r, mn, ymin = mn - 1.96*se, ymax = mn + 1.96*se, color = Cohort),
                  width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_line(data = pg8, aes(visit_year, predicted, color = Cohort), linewidth = 1.5) +
    annotate("richtext", x = 0.05, y = 45,
             label = stat_label8, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
             size = 3.5, fill = "white", color = "black",
             label.size = 0.5, label.r = unit(0.15, "lines"),
             family = "sans") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 8, 1), limits = c(0, 8.1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 45, 5), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    labs(x = "Years since Baseline", y = "MDS-UPDRS III Score",
         title = "PPMI Cohort (Censored at 8 Years)") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.15),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", vjust = -14),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 10, -5, 10)) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(18, 45))

  n_tbl8$Cohort <- factor(n_tbl8$Cohort, levels = c("MC1R PD", "SPD"))
    n_tbl8$n[n_tbl8$time == 0 & n_tbl8$Cohort == "MC1R PD"] <- 231
    n_tbl8$n[n_tbl8$time == 0 & n_tbl8$Cohort == "SPD"] <- 152
  p_n8 <- ggplot(n_tbl8, aes(x = time, y = Cohort, label = n)) +
    geom_text(aes(color = Cohort), size = 3.5, fontface = "plain") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 8, 1), limits = c(0, 8.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = c("MC1R PD" = expression(paste(italic("MC1R"), " carriers")),
                                "SPD" = "Non-carriers")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_void(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, face = "bold", color = "gray30",
                                     margin = margin(r = 10)),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = -0.15,
                                    color = "gray30", margin = margin(b = 3)),
          plot.margin = margin(-5, 10, 5, 60)) +
    ggtitle("No. of participants")

  fig_8yr <- p_main8 / p_n8 + plot_layout(heights = c(8, 1))

  print(fig_8yr)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_UPDRS3_8yr_Sensitivity.png"), fig_8yr, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Figure_UPDRS3_8yr_Sensitivity.pdf"), fig_8yr, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

## Supplemental: Person-Level Slope Distributions

```{r slope-density, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(fig_mod)) {
  re <- ranef(fig_mod)
  fe <- fixef(fig_mod)
  int_nm <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)[1]

  slope_df <- data.frame(
    participant_id = rownames(re),
    random_slope = re$visit_year
  ) %>%
    left_join(fdc %>% distinct(participant_id, Cohort), by = "participant_id") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Cohort)) %>%
    mutate(person_slope = ifelse(
      Cohort == "SPD",
      fe["visit_year"] + random_slope,
      fe["visit_year"] + fe[int_nm] + random_slope
    ))

  cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

  p_dens <- ggplot(slope_df, aes(x = person_slope, fill = Cohort, color = Cohort)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(data = slope_df %>% group_by(Cohort) %>% summarise(mn = mean(person_slope)),
               aes(xintercept = mn, color = Cohort), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed",
               show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    labs(x = "Estimated Person-Level Slope (MDS-UPDRS III pts/yr)",
         y = "Density",
         title = "PPMI: Distribution of Individual Motor Progression Rates") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA, linetype = 0)),
           color = "none")

  print(p_dens)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_Density_PPMI.png"), p_dens, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_Density_PPMI.pdf"), p_dens, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

```{r slope-vs-treatment, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(fig_mod) && exists("slope_df")) {
  max_fu <- fdc %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(max_year = max(visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  trt_time <- d_u3 %>%
    filter(participant_id %in% slope_df$participant_id, !is.na(LEDD), LEDD > 0) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    slice_min(visit_year, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(participant_id, trt_year = visit_year)

  slope_trt <- slope_df %>%
    left_join(max_fu, by = "participant_id") %>%
    left_join(trt_time, by = "participant_id") %>%
    mutate(
      started_trt = !is.na(trt_year),
      time_to_trt = coalesce(trt_year, max_year)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(time_to_trt))

  slope_trt <- slope_trt %>%
    mutate(group_label = interaction(
      ifelse(Cohort == "MC1R PD", "<i>MC1R</i> carriers", "Non-carriers"),
      ifelse(started_trt, "Started treatment", "Not yet treated"),
      sep = " - "
    ))

  grp_cols <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment" = "#B2182B",
                "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Not yet treated" = "#B2182B",
                "Non-carriers - Started treatment" = "#2166AC",
                "Non-carriers - Not yet treated" = "#2166AC")
  grp_shapes <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment" = 16,
                   "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Not yet treated" = 1,
                   "Non-carriers - Started treatment" = 16,
                   "Non-carriers - Not yet treated" = 1)
  grp_order <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment", "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Not yet treated",
                  "Non-carriers - Started treatment", "Non-carriers - Not yet treated")
  slope_trt$group_label <- factor(slope_trt$group_label, levels = grp_order)

  p_trt <- ggplot(slope_trt, aes(x = time_to_trt, y = person_slope,
                                  color = group_label, shape = group_label)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(data = slope_trt, aes(x = time_to_trt, y = person_slope, color = Cohort),
                method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed",
                show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(grp_cols, "SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B"),
                       breaks = grp_order, name = NULL) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = grp_shapes, breaks = grp_order, name = NULL) +
    labs(x = "Time to Treatment Initiation (years)",
         y = "Estimated Person-Level Slope (pts/yr)",
         title = "PPMI: Progression Rate vs. Time to Treatment Initiation") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3)) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 3))

  print(p_trt)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_vs_Treatment_PPMI.png"), p_trt, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_vs_Treatment_PPMI.pdf"), p_trt, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

```{r attrition, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
att <- fdc %>%
  mutate(yr = floor(visit_year)) %>%
  group_by(Cohort, yr) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")

cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

p_att <- ggplot(att, aes(x = yr, y = n, color = Cohort, group = Cohort)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -1, size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +
  labs(x = "Year of Follow-up", y = "Participants with Assessments",
       title = "PPMI: Sample Size by Year of Follow-up") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_markdown(),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3))

print(p_att)
ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Attrition_PPMI.png"), p_att, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
ggsave(file.path(config$out_dir, "Supplemental_Attrition_PPMI.pdf"), p_att, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
```

## Demographics Table 1

```{r table1}
u3_summ <- d_u3 %>%
  group_by(participant_id, Cohort) %>%
  summarise(bl_updrs3 = first(score, order_by = visit_year),
            max_fu = max(visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
moca_summ <- d_moca %>%
  group_by(participant_id, Cohort) %>%
  summarise(bl_moca = first(score, order_by = visit_year), .groups = "drop")
ledd_summ <- d_u3 %>%
  group_by(participant_id, Cohort) %>%
  summarise(bl_ledd = first(LEDD, order_by = visit_year), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(on_dopa = !is.na(bl_ledd) & bl_ledd > 0)

dem_tbl <- dem %>%
  left_join(u3_summ, by = c("Subject_ID" = "participant_id", "Cohort")) %>%
  left_join(moca_summ, by = c("Subject_ID" = "participant_id", "Cohort")) %>%
  left_join(ledd_summ, by = c("Subject_ID" = "participant_id", "Cohort")) %>%
  mutate(
    Race_detail = case_when(
      Race == "White" ~ "White",
      grepl("Asian", Race, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Asian",
      grepl("Black", Race, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Black",
      grepl("Multi", Race, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Multiracial",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"),
    Hispanic     = grepl("Hispanic or Latino", Ethnicity, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Parent_PD    = grepl("^Yes", `Parent with PD`, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Other_Rel_PD = grepl("^Yes", `Other Relative with PD`, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Melanoma     = grepl("Melanoma", `History of Skin Cancer`, ignore.case = TRUE),
    SAA_pos      = `SAA Result` == "Positive",
    SAA_neg      = `SAA Result` == "Negative",
    SAA_unavail  = !(`SAA Result` %in% c("Positive", "Negative")),
    is_hom       = Homozygote == "Yes"
  )

build_col <- function(d) {
  n <- nrow(d)
  pct <- function(x) sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(x, na.rm = TRUE), 100 * mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  med_iqr <- function(x) {
    x <- x[!is.na(x)]; if (!length(x)) return("\u2014")
    sprintf("%.1f (%.1f\u2013%.1f)", median(x), quantile(x, .25), quantile(x, .75))
  }
  mn_sd <- function(x) {
    x <- x[!is.na(x)]; if (!length(x)) return("\u2014")
    sprintf("%.1f \u00b1 %.1f", mean(x), sd(x))
  }
  saa_pos_n <- sum(d$SAA_pos, na.rm = TRUE)
  saa_neg_n <- sum(d$SAA_neg, na.rm = TRUE)
  saa_known <- saa_pos_n + saa_neg_n

  c(N = as.character(n),
    Homozygotes = pct(d$is_hom),
    `Age at baseline (years)` = mn_sd(d$Age_baseline),
    `Years since diagnosis` = mn_sd(d$Diagnosis),
    `Age at PD onset (years)` = mn_sd(d$`Age at PD onset`),
    Male = pct(d$Sex == "Male"),
    Race = "",
    `  White` = pct(d$Race_detail == "White"),
    `  Asian` = pct(d$Race_detail == "Asian"),
    `  Black` = pct(d$Race_detail == "Black"),
    `  Multiracial` = pct(d$Race_detail == "Multiracial"),
    `  Unknown` = pct(d$Race_detail == "Unknown"),
    `Hispanic or Latino` = pct(d$Hispanic),
    `Relatives with PD` = "",
    `  Parent` = pct(d$Parent_PD),
    `  Other` = pct(d$Other_Rel_PD),
    `SAA status` = "",
    `  Positive` = pct(d$SAA_pos),
    `  Negative` = pct(d$SAA_neg),
    `  Unavailable` = pct(d$SAA_unavail),
    `SAA positivity` = if (saa_known > 0)
      sprintf("%d/%d (%.1f%%)", saa_pos_n, saa_known, 100*saa_pos_n/saa_known) else "\u2014",
    `History of melanoma` = pct(d$Melanoma),
    `MDS-UPDRS III at baseline` = mn_sd(d$bl_updrs3),
    `MoCA at baseline` = mn_sd(d$bl_moca),
    `On dopaminergic medication` = pct(d$on_dopa),
    `Average follow-up (years)` = mn_sd(d$max_fu))
}

cohorts <- list(
  SPD = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "SPD"),
  `MC1R PD` = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R PD"),
  `LRRK2 PD` = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "LRRK2 PD"),
  `MC1R + LRRK2 PD` = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R + LRRK2 PD"),
  `GBA PD` = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "GBA PD"),
  `MC1R + GBA PD` = dem_tbl %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R + GBA PD"),
  All = dem_tbl)

table1 <- data.frame(Characteristic = names(build_col(dem_tbl)))
for (cn in names(cohorts)) table1[[cn]] <- build_col(cohorts[[cn]])
print(knitr::kable(table1, caption = "Table 1"))
```

## Output

```{r output}
fmt_out <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & matches("Slope|Beta|SE|CI|Mean|Diff"), ~ round(., 3)),
           across(where(is.numeric) & matches("P_value"), ~ round(., 4)))
}

all_bio <- bind_rows(saa_bl_df, csf_bl_df, asyn_bl, nfl_df, gfap_df)
sec_all <- bind_rows(u1_res, moca_res, dat_c_res, dat_p_res, u2_res, u4_res, comb_res, total_res)

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Table1"); writeData(wb, "Table1", table1)
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3", fmt_out(u3_df))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_ON"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_ON", fmt_out(u3on_df))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_Stratified"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_Stratified", fmt_out(u3_strat_df))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores", sub_off_df)
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores_ON"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores_ON", sub_on_df)
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores_All"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores_All", sub_all_df)

addWorksheet(wb, "Cocarrier_Full")
writeData(wb, "Cocarrier_Full", bind_rows(cc_off_full, cc_on_full) %>% fmt_out())
addWorksheet(wb, "Cocarrier_Penetrance")
writeData(wb, "Cocarrier_Penetrance", bind_rows(cc_pen_off, cc_pen_on) %>% fmt_out())

outcome_sheets <- c(
  "MDS-UPDRS I" = "UPDRS1", "MDS-UPDRS II" = "UPDRS2", "MDS-UPDRS IV" = "UPDRS4",
  "MoCA" = "MoCA", "DAT-SPECT Caudate" = "DAT_Caudate", "DAT-SPECT Putamen" = "DAT_Putamen",
  "Combined MDS-UPDRS I-III" = "UPDRS_Combined", "Total MDS-UPDRS I-IV" = "UPDRS_Total")
for (ol in names(outcome_sheets)) {
  sn <- outcome_sheets[ol]
  rows <- sec_all %>% filter(Outcome == ol)
  if (nrow(rows) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, sn); writeData(wb, sn, fmt_out(rows)) }
}

addWorksheet(wb, "CSF_Biomarkers"); writeData(wb, "CSF_Biomarkers", fmt_out(all_bio))
if (nrow(saa_pen) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "SAA_Penetrance"); writeData(wb, "SAA_Penetrance", fmt_out(saa_pen)) }
if (AGE_INT_OK) { addWorksheet(wb, "Age_Interaction"); writeData(wb, "Age_Interaction", age_int) }
if (SEX_INT_OK) { addWorksheet(wb, "Sex_Interaction"); writeData(wb, "Sex_Interaction", sex_int) }
if (DUR_INT_OK) { addWorksheet(wb, "Duration_Interaction"); writeData(wb, "Duration_Interaction", dur_int) }

if (GEN_IND_OK) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "Genetic_Ind_Coefs"); writeData(wb, "Genetic_Ind_Coefs", gi_coef)
  if (nrow(gi_strata) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "Genetic_Ind_Strata"); writeData(wb, "Genetic_Ind_Strata", gi_strata) }
  if (gi_m3a$success) {
    m3a_tbl <- as.data.frame(summary(gi_m3a$model)$tTable)
    m3a_tbl$Term <- rownames(m3a_tbl)
    m3a_tbl <- m3a_tbl[, c("Term", setdiff(names(m3a_tbl), "Term"))]
    addWorksheet(wb, "Genetic_Ind_M3a"); writeData(wb, "Genetic_Ind_M3a", m3a_tbl)
  }
  if (gi_m3b$success) {
    m3b_tbl <- as.data.frame(summary(gi_m3b$model)$tTable)
    m3b_tbl$Term <- rownames(m3b_tbl)
    m3b_tbl <- m3b_tbl[, c("Term", setdiff(names(m3b_tbl), "Term"))]
    addWorksheet(wb, "Genetic_Ind_M3b"); writeData(wb, "Genetic_Ind_M3b", m3b_tbl)
  }
}

if (nrow(scopa_df) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "SCOPA_AUT"); writeData(wb, "SCOPA_AUT", fmt_out(scopa_df)) }
if (nrow(gds_df) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "GDS"); writeData(wb, "GDS", fmt_out(gds_df)) }
if (nrow(subtype_df) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "TD_PIGD"); writeData(wb, "TD_PIGD", fmt_out(subtype_df)) }
if (nrow(trend_results) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "Dose_Penetrance_Trends"); writeData(wb, "Dose_Penetrance_Trends", trend_results) }
if (nrow(fp_df) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "Fast_Progressor"); writeData(wb, "Fast_Progressor", fp_df)
  if (nrow(fp_trend) > 0) writeData(wb, "Fast_Progressor", fp_trend, startRow = nrow(fp_df) + 3)
}
if (nrow(ess_df) > 0) { addWorksheet(wb, "ESS"); writeData(wb, "ESS", fmt_out(ess_df)) }

if (length(sens_results) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "Sensitivity"); writeData(wb, "Sensitivity", bind_rows(sens_results))
}

saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(config$out_dir, paste0("MC1R_Results_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx")), overwrite = TRUE)
```

```{r summary}
table(dem$Cohort)
pm <- u3_df %>% filter(Analysis_type == "primary", LEDD_adjusted == "Yes", Group == "MC1R PD")
ps <- u3_df %>% filter(Analysis_type == "primary", LEDD_adjusted == "Yes", Group == "SPD")
if (nrow(pm) > 0 && nrow(ps) > 0)
  cat(sprintf("SPD: %.2f pts/yr | MC1R: %.2f pts/yr | diff=%.2f (%.1f%%), p=%s\n",
              ps$Slope, pm$Slope, pm$Beta_diff, pm$Pct_diff, fmt_p(pm$P_value)))
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
